name: Blackwing - Brisote the Tailwind
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＦ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブラックフェザー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>追</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>お</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い<ruby lang="jp"><rb>風</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かぜ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のアリゼ
desc: If 2 or more face-up "Blackwing" monsters you control were destroyed this turn, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If this card is sent to the Graveyard as a Synchro Material: Gain 600 LP.
mnst_eff: If 2 or more face-up "Blackwing" monsters you control were destroyed this turn, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If this card is sent to the Graveyard as a Synchro Material: Gain 600 LP.
eff: If 2 or more face-up "Blackwing" monsters you control were destroyed this turn, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If this card is sent to the Graveyard as a Synchro Material: Gain 600 LP.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
